title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Key Exchange
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #7, Blackbeard, Spandam, Unknown person #13 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #7, Blackbeard, Spandam, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't let them have their way anymore!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Eh? They stopped in the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...!! HE PRETENDED LIKE HE WAS RUNNING,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thanks, RED nose... for saving us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: he needs to be treated soon...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And who are you calling Red nose!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: to send him into the new age!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: It looks like words are useless now...
